svg.title: HireGraph parallel multi-agent architecture
svg.desc: Three execution groups: Group 1 runs JD Parser and Resume Screeners in parallel, Group 2 runs Ranker and Bias Checker in parallel, Group 3 runs Outreach Drafter sequentially before final outputs.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Supervisor do in HireGraph?')
sendPrompt('How does the JD Parser agent work?')
sendPrompt('How does parallel resume screening work with the Send API?')
sendPrompt('Why does Bias Checker run in Group 1 alongside JD Parser?')
sendPrompt('What is a barrier node in LangGraph?')
sendPrompt('How does the Ranker agent score candidates?')
sendPrompt('How does the Outreach Drafter agent work?')
sendPrompt('What is a barrier node in LangGraph?')
sendPrompt('What does the ranked candidate list look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the bias audit report include?')
sendPrompt('What do the outreach email drafts look like?')
